title: Online Event: Make your CRM work for you, not the other way around
excerpt:

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s time for another sales CRM webinar with the great Ron Kimhi, Head of sales CRM GTM and Account Executive, Omar Daoudi!

This time the focus will be on making your CRM work for you, not the other way around. Join our webinar to gain insight on how to make your CRM work effectively, improve your business productivity and achieve your goals.
